name: jackal-plugins
description: Jackal harness — model-adaptive planning, execution, and project supervision for Claude Code.

plugins.name: jackal-house-style
plugins.description: Coding standards — TypeScript, React, Python, Postgres, and testing patterns.

plugins.name: jackal-plan-and-execute
plugins.description: Model-adaptive planning and execution harness. Sonnet implementors, conditional review, continuous backlog execution.

plugins.name: jackal-supervisor
plugins.description: Project supervisor — backlog management, conflict gates, complexity routing, and lifecycle orchestration.

plugins.name: jackal-director
plugins.description: Software Director review loop — Haiku conformance agents (delta digest, contract sentinel, lexicon warden, registry drift), canon documents, director packets, and directive ingestion.

plugins.name: ed3d-hook-security-hardening
plugins.description: PreToolUse/PostToolUse hooks that catch common secrets-leakage patterns: echoing env vars, reading secret files, tokens in URLs, and missing gitignore/permissions on sensitive files.
